title: Outcomes that matter to your organization
intro: Whether you're launching a critical initiative, scaling product delivery, or transforming how work gets done — I bring the structure and leadership to make it happen.

services.title: Complex Program Leadership
services.description: I orchestrate multi-team programs with clear roadmaps, outcome-driven planning, and rigorous accountability. From portfolio strategy to sprint execution, I ensure leadership has visibility and teams have clarity — leveraging modern tools (Jira, Confluence, Miro, EazyBI) and automation wherever possible to streamline delivery.

services.title: Product Strategy & Roadmapping
services.description: I translate business objectives into executable product roadmaps. Through OKR development, portfolio reviews, and stakeholder alignment sessions, I create shared understanding between executives, product, and engineering — so everyone moves in the same direction.

services.title: Agile Transformation & Process Design
services.description: I lead enterprise agile transformations that stick — transitioning siloed teams into cross-functional squads with sustainable frameworks. From SAFe implementations to custom Scrum/Kanban hybrids, I design processes around your people and culture, not the other way around.

services.title: Team Leadership & Coaching
services.description: I build high-performing teams through hands-on coaching for Scrum Masters, Product Owners, and engineering leads. By establishing trust, psychological safety, and clear communication frameworks, I create environments where great work happens naturally.
